contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Fix broken storesHitList GAS web app (dedup) — restore DApp store/warmup surfaces
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/312
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed + fixed the live dapp.truesight.me bug (warmup_review 'Failed to load queue' / notifications 'Unexpected token <'). The holistic_hit_list_store_history GAS web app returned HTML 'Script function not found' for ALL actions — a compile failure from duplicate function defs across files (escapeHtml_, headerMap_, onOpen; GAS shares one global namespace). Deduped (removed dup escapeHtml_/headerMap_ from email_agent_drafts.gs; merged onOpen menus into partner_poke_drafts.gs), rebuilt the clasp mirror from clean canonical, clasp deploy'd @48 to the /exec. Verified all actions return JSON again (store history, status summary, warmup queue) — restored multiple DApp surfaces. Confirmed NOT caused by the dapp beta/prod migration (server-side GAS). Ruled out nginx via testing the proxy + a known-good action. Remaining separate issue: getWarmupReviewQueue is slow (~25-60s) → Edgar nginx 504 on that one action.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/312
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
